title: MedicationStatement → drug_exposure (RxNorm)
notes:
MedicationStatement is patient-reported / record-of medication use (not a prescription, not a dispense). Its own stage-2 SQL (`MedicationStatement__drug_exposure.sql`, mode append) gives it a distinct `drug_type_concept_id = 38000178` ('Medication list entry'). RxNorm is preferred, NDC is the prio-2 fallback; both go through an INNER JOIN on 'Maps to' → standard Drug, so an unmapped code yields NO row.

Dates: `drug_exposure_start_date/datetime = COALESCE(effective.ofType(dateTime), effectivePeriod.start)`; `drug_exposure_end_date/datetime = COALESCE(effectivePeriod.end, effective dateTime, effectivePeriod.start)`. The view extracts `effective_dt` (effective dateTime), `period_start` / `period_end` (effectivePeriod). Datetime casts use `::timestamp` — the FHIR dateTime string with a `+00:00` offset is truncated to wall-clock (NO UTC shift). `person_id ← subject`, `visit_occurrence_id ← context` (R4 'context'). NO provider mapped → `provider_id` NULL.

Status filter: `WHERE COALESCE(status,'active') NOT IN ('entered-in-error','cancelled')` — so 'active' (and a missing status) is kept; 'entered-in-error' is dropped.

Grounding from the live May-2026 Athena bundle: RxNorm concept_code 313782 = concept_id 1127433 'acetaminophen 325 MG Oral Tablet', vocabulary_id='RxNorm', domain_id='Drug', standard 'S', and self-maps via 'Maps to'. So drug_concept_id = drug_source_concept_id = 1127433; drug_source_value is the concept_code '313782' (`src_code = code` from the codes CTE).

Every non-NULL drug_exposure column is asserted; the columns the stage-2 SELECT hard-codes to NULL (verbatim_end_date, stop_reason, refills, quantity, days_supply, sig, route_concept_id, lot_number, provider_id, visit_detail_id, route_source_value, dose_unit_source_value) are omitted and therefore asserted NULL. drug_exposure is the ONLY target table for this branch; the `omop:{}` case asserts zero rows everywhere.

cases.desc: (a) active MedicationStatement, RxNorm standard Drug + effectivePeriod → drug_exposure, type 38000178, start=period.start, end=period.end, visit from context
(b) MedicationStatement with effectiveDateTime only (no period) → start=end=effectiveDateTime, no encounter context → visit_occurrence_id NULL, no provider
(e1) MedicationStatement status entered-in-error → filtered by WHERE, zero rows
